first_run.rationale: The evaluations are substantively identical, with the same score, core strengths, and concerns. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's extensive experience, current AI work, and lack of specific framework knowledge (Nest.js). The minor variations in wording fall well within the range of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any bias based on the shifted dates, which imply an older candidate.
